list_name: OFAC Sectoral Sanctions — Russian Energy Sector (SSI List)
designation_reason: Entity in Russian energy sector subject to OFAC Sectoral Sanctions (Directive 4 under EO 13662) — prohibition on US persons providing debt/equity to entities in Russia's energy sector
transaction_prohibition_details: US persons prohibited from transacting in debt of 90 days or longer maturity. Wire payments may constitute prohibited transactions depending on nature.
